problem id: baf66f84
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND NOT SHR(3)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  10001110 -> 00110011
  11001011 -> 00011001
  00001011 -> 10001001
  11010101 -> 11111110
  00111010 -> 11001111
  10111011 -> 11111111
  00111000 -> 10001111
  11101101 -> 10011101
  10111100 -> 00010111
  11010011 -> 00111010

query: 10010011
predicted answer: 10111010
